name: codex-agent-loop-orchestrator
description: A thin, repo-local orchestration layer for durable multi-agent Codex workflows: lane registration, a durable request lifecycle, handoff readiness gates, cross-thread delivery with a file-inbox fallback, checkpoint review/fix loops, and optional Codex Loop Engineering auto-chain.

interface.shortDescription: Durable multi-agent Codex loops with lanes, typed messages, and verification gates.
interface.longDescription: Sets up or continues a repo-local multi-agent Codex workflow. Project truth stays in repo files under docs/loop/, agent identities live in a lane registry (agent-lanes.md), and thread tools act only as the message bus with a durable file-based inbox/outbox fallback. Product, Implementation, and Review lanes (plus optional specialist lanes) hand work back and forth across sessions using a fixed message envelope and a durable request lifecycle (requests.md), survive context compaction or an app restart, and resume from files instead of re-planning from chat memory. Includes a deterministic completion gate, atomic crash-safe delivery, advisory file leases with git pre-commit write-scope enforcement, a budget stop gate, heartbeat/orphan recovery, and an append-only run log.
defaultPrompt: Use codex-agent-loop-orchestrator to set up a Product / Implementation / Review loop for this project.
Use codex-agent-loop-orchestrator to continue the multi-agent loop and hand the open request to the review lane.
